tasks.title: Consolidate CI and governance for owner-approved merge
tasks.goal: Allow a green owner-approved PR to merge without obsolete checklist, review or stale-branch blockers.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Execute the AgentOS governance fluency correction plan with quality-gate CI, owner-approved merge policy and verified docs.
agentGoal.outcome: The repository has one required quality-gate, split PR/release audits and documented owner-approved squash-only merge governance.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm ci, npm run audit:pr, npm run doctor, npm run validate, npm test, git diff --check and GitHub PR checks
constraints: Do not publish a tag or prerelease in this correction slice.
Do not run a real deploy without AGENTOS_DEPLOY_COMMAND.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Use failing tests to define the expected governance policy, then make the smallest CI/docs/harness change that passes.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop if GitHub permissions prevent branch-protection or repository-settings readback after three attempts.

acceptanceCriteria: PR checks are represented by a single required quality-gate.
Legacy checklist workflow is removed from the required merge surface.
PR audit and release audit are separate commands.
Docs describe owner-approved merge with required reviews disabled, auto-merge, update branch and squash-only policy.
Local validation and GitHub PR checks pass before merge.

evidence.criterion: PR checks are represented by a single required quality-gate.
evidence.result: Passed full validation with quality-gate workflow coverage.

evidence.criterion: Legacy checklist workflow is removed from the required merge surface.
evidence.result: Passed full validation after removing the legacy checklist workflow.

evidence.criterion: PR audit and release audit are separate commands.
evidence.result: Passed release audit; PR audit also passed with zero high vulnerabilities.

evidence.criterion: Docs describe owner-approved merge with required reviews disabled, auto-merge, update branch and squash-only policy.
evidence.result: Passed documentation validation and governance-fluency tests.

evidence.criterion: Local validation and GitHub PR checks pass before merge.
evidence.result: Passed local diff hygiene; GitHub checks are recorded after PR publication.
